title: Interpret and apply automotive repair instructions
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Interpret and apply automotive repair instructions demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop work plan for repair

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Obtain and interpret repair information, including workplace and manufacturer procedures and specifications 1.3 Identify recommended repair procedures and prepare work plan according to workplace and manufacturer procedures and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Obtain and interpret repair information, including workplace and manufacturer procedures and specifications 1.3 Identify recommended repair procedures and prepare work plan according to workplace and manufacturer procedures and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Obtain and interpret repair information, including workplace and manufacturer procedures and specifications 1.3 Identify recommended repair procedures and prepare work plan according to workplace and manufacturer procedures and specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop work plan for repair

elements.title: Initiate repairs

pcs.text: Identify tools and equipment required for servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures2.2 Carry out repairs according to workplace and manufacturer procedures and specifications and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Report additional required work identified during repair process to supervisor and document according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify tools and equipment required for servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures2.2 Carry out repairs according to workplace and manufacturer procedures and specifications and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Report additional required work identified during repair process to supervisor and document according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify tools and equipment required for servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures2.2 Carry out repairs according to workplace and manufacturer procedures and specifications and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Report additional required work identified during repair process to supervisor and document according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Initiate repairs

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Inspect completed work according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect completed work according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect completed work according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
